props.caption: The arena's perimeter: eleven host metros, one task force, and the data that stops in March

items.note: FIFA suspended the automatic ban on the host nation's striker under Article 27 of its code the day before tonight's round-of-16, leaving the sanction on the books and waiving its consequence. Belgium formally appealed, and UEFA called the move unprecedented, incomprehensible and unjustifiable, per Reuters.

items.place: The host cities · the shadow at baseline
items.note: A presidential task force housed in DHS runs the tournament's security, matches carry SEAR 1-2 ratings, and enforcement shows neither a documented surge nor a truce. The datasets that would settle it stop in early March — three months before kickoff.

Unitree cleared a regulator-approved IPO on 5,500 humanoids shipped, Figure's third-generation robot took up multi-step work on BMW's line, and AgiBot passed 15,000 units. The attention leader shipped press chatter.

The first US session since the chip rout opened with rotation inside the AI trade rather than flight from it, September hike odds near a coin flip, and the desk's yen call twenty pips from its trigger.

items.what: A Russian missile strike on a Kyiv residential block killed at least twelve people in the capital's deadliest attack of the week, as Ukraine claimed overnight hits on three Russian refineries and the Vysotsk oil terminal.
The UN Human Rights Council ordered an urgent inquiry into El Obeid, where the RSF's drone tempo against the besieged North Kordofan capital has run at record levels.
Mali's multi-axis insurgent offensive entered a third day, with OSINT accounts tracking a stalled army and Africa Corps relief convoy short of Anefis; control claims on both sides remain unverified.
France awaits the Le Pen appeal ruling due Tuesday, a decision that shapes 2027 eligibility, while a heatwave no-confidence motion hangs over the government and wildfires burn in three countries.
NATO's summit opens Tuesday with South Korea's president attending under the Indo-Pacific partner format, a week after Taiwan counted a record Chinese presence across the First Island Chain.
Venezuela's coastal earthquake toll rose to 3,342 dead with more than 17,000 left homeless, as the government stood up a military emergency unit for La Guaira's recovery.
